@@ -0,0 +1,73 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "netdata-4852-supervisord-monitoring",
+  "missionClass": "fixer",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "netdata: Supervisord monitoring",
+    "description": "Supervisord monitoring. Requested by 11+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current netdata setup",
+        "description": "Verify your netdata version and configuration:\n```bash\nnetdata -v\n```\nThis feature requires a working netdata installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review netdata configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant netdata configuration:\nWe are willing to support monitoring ***[Supervisord](http://supervisord.org/)*** with netdata."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Supervisord monitoring",
+        "description": "thx, i setup the lab and get processes info metrics ([`supervisor.getAllProcessInfo`](http://supervisord.org/api.html#supervisor.rpcinterface.SupervisorNamespaceRPCInterface.getAllProcessInfo)):\n\n```go\n{Name:00 Group:proc1 Start:1607884769 Stop:1607884771 Now:1607887222 State:200 StateName:FATAL\n```yaml\n> list of configured supervised jobs\nnumber of running processes for every job\nnumber of not running processes per job\nstatus of each process (running/starting/failed etc)\nuptime of each process (combined to 1 chart for every configured job)\n\nAbout charts, do you mean a subsection per a job (process’ group), something like this: (?)\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected.\nConfirm the feature described in \"Supervisord monitoring\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "thx, i setup the lab and get processes info metrics ([`supervisor.getAllProcessInfo`](http://supervisord.org/api.html#supervisor.rpcinterface.SupervisorNamespaceRPCInterface.getAllProcessInfo)):\n\n```go\n{Name:00 Group:proc1 Start:1607884769 Stop:1607884771 Now:1607887222 State:200 StateName:FATAL SpawnErr: ExitStatus:0 StdoutLogfile: StderrLogfile: PID:0}\n{Name:00 Group:proc2 Start:1607887220",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "> list of configured supervised jobs\nnumber of running processes for every job\nnumber of not running processes per job\nstatus of each process (running/starting/failed etc)\nuptime of each process (combined to 1 chart for every configured job)\n\nAbout charts, do you mean a subsection per a job (process’ group), something like this: (?)"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "netdata",
+      "community",
+      "monitoring",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "netdata"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "community",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/netdata/netdata/issues/4852",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/netdata/netdata"
+    },
+    "reactions": 11,
+    "comments": 10,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "tools": [
+      "netdata"
+    ],
+    "description": "A working netdata installation or development environment."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-04-01T07:03:07.466Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
